files.patch:
@@ -4,10 +4,10 @@ All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
 
 The format is based on “Keep a Changelog”, and this project aims to follow Semantic Versioning.
 
-## [0.1.15] - 2025-12-13
+## [0.1.17] - 2025-12-13
 
-### Changed
-- `sonos group status` now hides invisible/bonded devices by default (use `--all` to include them).
+### Added
+- `sonos group solo --name "<Room>"` to ungroup the current group and leave only that room for playback.
 
 ## [0.1.16] - 2025-12-13
 
@@ -16,6 +16,11 @@ The format is based on “Keep a Changelog”, and this project aims to follow S
   - `sonos config set defaultRoom "Office"` to make `--name` optional.
   - `sonos config set format json` to default `--format`.
 
+## [0.1.15] - 2025-12-13
+
+### Changed
+- `sonos group status` now hides invisible/bonded devices by default (use `--all` to include them).
+
 ## [0.1.14] - 2025-12-13
 
 ### Added

@@ -195,6 +195,12 @@ Ungroup a speaker (make it standalone):
 ./sonos group unjoin --name "Bedroom"
 ```
 
+Solo a speaker (ungroup its current group so it plays alone):
+
+```bash
+./sonos group solo --name "Office"
+```
+
 Party mode (join all visible speakers to a target group):
 
 ```bash
